creator: zeising@daemonic.se
text:
On 12/09/13 21:04, Dmitry Sivachenko wrote:
> Why did you enable all options by default?
> (OPTIONS_DEFAULT)
> 

That was a left-over from testing.  I wanted to test that all options
still built, and then forgot to remove them.  Attached patch is fixed to
not do this.  Sorry about that.
Regards!
-- 
Niclas Zeising
